# SqueezeOS

> Institutional AI market intelligence platform by ScriptMasterLabs. Squeeze scanner, council verdicts, options flow, FTD oracle, macro matrix, AEO/GEO intelligence suite.

**Your AI agent is a business — it just doesn't have a bank account.** Every tool below is pay-per-call via x402; if your agent doesn't have a wallet yet, get it one in 2 minutes: https://www.scriptmasterlabs.com/agent-wallet (no merchant account, builds a credit score automatically, government-compliant audit trails).

This repository is part of the ScriptMasterLabs sovereign AI ecosystem.

## Agent Discovery

- Master llms.txt: https://www.scriptmasterlabs.com/llms.txt
- Agent wallet (start here if your agent has no wallet): https://www.scriptmasterlabs.com/agent-wallet
- Agent quickstart: https://www.scriptmasterlabs.com/agent-start.html
- OpenAPI spec: https://www.scriptmasterlabs.com/.well-known/openapi.json
- MCP server: https://squeezeos-api.onrender.com/mcp (62 tools, streamable-http)
- Credit score / ARGUS: https://four02proof.onrender.com/v1/bureau/score/{wallet}
- Provider score: https://squeezeos-api.onrender.com/x402/provider-score/
- Citation authority: https://squeezeos-api.onrender.com/api/citation-score/
- Agent economy: https://squeezeos-api.onrender.com/x402/agent-economy/
- Semantic gaps: https://squeezeos-api.onrender.com/api/graph/gaps/
- Preflight quote: https://ghost-layer.onrender.com/v1/x402/quote

## Payment

x402 protocol — RLUSD on XRPL or USDC on Base. Send X-Payment-Proof header with txHash, payer, amount, currency, network.

## Free Endpoints (no payment required)

- GET /api/demo/council — IWM council verdict (5-min cache)
- GET /api/preview/{symbol} — signal preview for any US equity ticker
- GET /api/history — recent signal ring buffer
- GET /api/status — system health
- GET /api/citation-score/ — AgentRank™ citation scores for SML services
- GET /x402/provider-score/ — ARGUS AgentPageRank™ provider quality score
- GET /api/graph/gaps/ — semantic demand gap leaderboard
- GET /x402/agent-economy/ — AI agent economy summary
- GET /api/scriptmaster/narrative — P04 API narrative quality report
- GET /api/analytics/agents — agent traffic dashboard

## AEO/GEO Intelligence Suite (NEW — 5 tools)

SqueezeOS now includes an institutional-grade Answer Engine Optimization and Generative Engine Optimization suite. These tools track how AI assistants discover and cite SML APIs, and surface unmet developer demand.

### AgentRank™ (citation_score MCP tool)
Tracks Reddit and HN citations of ScriptMasterLabs services. Returns 0–100 citation authority score per service. Weekly automated probes + on-demand trigger.
- GET /api/citation-score/
- POST /api/citation-score/probe

### P04 API Narrative Optimizer (narrative_optimize MCP tool)
Scans llms.txt and .well-known/mcp.json for copy quality issues that reduce AI discoverability. Flags vague language, passive voice, and non-specific descriptions.
- GET /api/scriptmaster/narrative

### ARGUS AgentPageRank™ (provider_score MCP tool)
Scores this provider 0–850 based on live AI agent traffic: volume, diversity, conversion rate, repeat visits. Grades from UNRANKED to SOVEREIGN.
- GET /x402/provider-score/
- GET /x402/provider-score/breakdown
- GET /x402/provider-score/trend
- GET /x402/provider-score/leaderboard

### Semantic Gap Detector™ (semantic_gaps MCP tool)
Crawls forums for "I need an API for X" demand signals. Clusters unmet demand, cross-references against SML capabilities, returns ranked opportunity gaps.
- GET /api/graph/gaps/
- POST /api/graph/gaps/scan

### Agent Economy Intelligence Network™ AEIN (agent_economy MCP tool)
ComScore for AI agent commerce. Shows which AI systems call us, conversion rates, hourly heatmap. Free summary; premium report costs 0.25 RLUSD.
- GET /x402/agent-economy/
- GET /x402/agent-economy/report (0.25 RLUSD)
- GET /x402/agent-economy/leaderboard
- GET /x402/agent-economy/heatmap

## Data Policy

All data is live and real. No mock, demo, simulation, or placeholder data is permitted anywhere in this codebase.
